X-Stand Banner Hardware Specifications & Display Features

Our adjustable X-stand banner hardware provides a portable, professional display solution for trade shows, retail environments, and business presentations. This lightweight frame system features a high-impact plastic support hub with durable banner hooks designed for repeated use.

X-Stand Frame Construction

  • High-impact plastic support hub and banner hooks for durability
  • Strong, flexible fiberglass arms keep banners taut and wrinkle-free
  • Adjustable arm system accommodates multiple banner sizes
  • Lightweight 2-pound frame for easy transport and setup
  • 36" W x 78" H x 27.5" D assembled dimensions

Banner Compatibility

The adjustable arms accommodate banners ranging from 24" to 36" in width. To avoid damaging the frame, do not use banners below the minimum recommended size. Banner graphics are sold separately and can be customized with your artwork.

Display Applications

Ideal for indoor trade show booths, retail point-of-purchase displays, lobby presentations, and temporary promotional signage. The portable design allows for quick setup and breakdown at multiple locations.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Portable X-Stand Material for Indoor Trade Show Use

The X-stand frame is constructed from high-impact plastic components designed for repeated assembly and transport in trade show and business environments.

Frame Material Specifications

  • Support Hub: High-impact plastic construction resists cracking during transport
  • Banner Hooks: Reinforced plastic hooks designed for secure banner attachment
  • Support Arms: Flexible fiberglass rods provide tension without breaking
  • Weight: Only 2 pounds total for easy portability

Durability for Trade Show Use

The plastic hub and fiberglass arms are engineered to withstand frequent setup and breakdown cycles common in trade show environments. The lightweight construction reduces shipping costs while maintaining structural integrity.

Indoor Display Limitations

This X-stand hardware is designed for indoor use only. The lightweight construction is not suitable for outdoor applications where wind resistance is required.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

X-Stand Assembly & Setup Instructions

The adjustable X-stand banner hardware arrives ready to assemble with simple snap-together components that require no tools for setup.

Assembly Process

  • Connect fiberglass arms to the central plastic hub
  • Adjust arm length to match your banner width (24" to 36")
  • Attach banner to plastic hooks at each corner
  • Ensure banner is taut but not overstretched

Banner Attachment

Banners attach to the frame using grommets or pole pockets that hook onto the plastic banner hooks. Ensure your custom banner includes the appropriate finishing for X-stand compatibility.

Storage & Transport

The X-stand disassembles quickly for compact storage. Fiberglass arms nest together, and the plastic hub stores flat. The complete hardware kit fits in a compact carrying case for trade show transport.

Setup Dimensions

Assembled frame measures 36" wide x 78" high x 27.5" deep, accommodating standard trade show booth spaces and retail display areas.

Shipping Options for X-Stand Banner Hardware

Flexible shipping options available for X-stand hardware delivery, designed to meet trade show schedules and business timelines.

Standard Shipping Methods

  • Ground Shipping: Cost-effective for most X-stand hardware orders
  • Expedited Shipping: 2-day and overnight options for urgent needs
  • Freight Shipping: Available for large quantity orders
  • Trade Show Direct: Ship directly to convention centers when available

Packaging for Transport

X-stand hardware ships in protective packaging to prevent damage during transit. Lightweight components are secured to avoid shifting that could cause breakage.

Trade Show Delivery Considerations

  • Allow extra time for convention center receiving
  • Verify trade show freight handling requirements
  • Consider advance shipment to avoid show floor delays
  • Coordinate with trade show logistics for large orders

Shipping Costs

Shipping rates calculated based on destination, weight, and delivery speed selected. The lightweight 2-pound frame keeps shipping costs minimal for most destinations.

Trade Show & Business Display Uses for X-Stand Hardware

X-stand banner hardware serves multiple display applications across trade shows, retail environments, and business presentations.

Trade Show Applications

  • Booth Backdrops: Create professional backgrounds for trade show booths
  • Product Displays: Highlight specific products or services at exhibitions
  • Directional Signage: Guide attendees through booth layouts
  • Promotional Messaging: Display special offers or announcements
  • Company Branding: Reinforce brand identity throughout booth space

Retail Display Uses

  • Point-of-purchase promotions in stores
  • Seasonal campaign displays
  • New product launch announcements
  • Sale and clearance event signage
  • Store directory and wayfinding

Business Environment Applications

  • Lobby and reception area displays
  • Conference and meeting room presentations
  • Employee communication boards
  • Safety and compliance messaging
  • Visitor welcome displays

Event & Presentation Uses

Perfect for seminars, workshops, job fairs, and corporate events where portable, professional signage is required. The quick setup makes it ideal for temporary installations.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

X-Stand Banner Design & Size Requirements

Artwork specifications and design guidelines for banners used with adjustable X-stand hardware to ensure optimal display results.

Banner Size Specifications

  • Width Range: 24" to 36" (X-stand adjusts within this range)
  • Recommended Height: 60" to 72" for optimal display proportion
  • Minimum Size: Do not use banners below 24" width to avoid frame damage
  • Finishing Required: Grommets or pole pockets for hook attachment

Design Considerations

  • Keep important text and graphics away from edges where grommets attach
  • Design for vertical orientation (portrait layout)
  • Consider viewing distance when selecting font sizes
  • Use high-contrast colors for maximum trade show visibility

File Preparation Guidelines

  • Resolution: 150 DPI minimum for print quality
  • File Formats: PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution JPG
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed Area: Include 0.125" bleed on all sides

Banner Material Options

X-stand hardware accommodates various banner materials including vinyl, fabric, and mesh depending on display environment and durability requirements. Consult material specifications for weight limitations.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

X-Stand Banner Hardware FAQ

What banner sizes work with this X-stand hardware?

The adjustable X-stand accommodates banners from 24" to 36" in width. Heights of 60" to 72" provide optimal proportions. Do not use banners below the minimum 24" width as this can damage the frame.

What type of banner finishing is required?

Banners need grommets or pole pockets to attach to the plastic hooks on the X-stand frame. Standard grommet placement works best for secure attachment and easy setup.

How much does the X-stand hardware weigh?

The complete X-stand hardware weighs only 2 pounds, making it highly portable for trade shows and business presentations. The lightweight design also reduces shipping costs.

Can X-stand hardware be used outdoors?

No, this X-stand system is designed for indoor use only. The lightweight construction is not suitable for outdoor conditions where wind resistance is required.

How does the X-stand assemble?

Assembly is tool-free and simple. Connect the fiberglass arms to the central plastic hub, adjust for your banner width, and attach your banner to the corner hooks. Setup takes just a few minutes.

What's included with the X-stand hardware?

The hardware kit includes the plastic support hub, banner hooks, and adjustable fiberglass arms. Banners are sold separately and can be customized with your artwork and specifications.

Can I get volume pricing for multiple X-stands?

Yes, volume pricing is available for multiple units. Contact our customer service team at 866.419.7446 for custom quotes on larger quantities or bulk orders for trade show companies.

How quickly can X-stand hardware ship?

Standard production ranges from 2 to 5 business days, with expedited shipping options available. For trade show deadlines, we recommend ordering with extra lead time to account for any shipping delays.
